cloud.terraform.plan_stash.short_description: Handle the base64 encoding or decoding of a terraform plan file
cloud.terraform.plan_stash.description: This module performs base64-encoding of a terraform plan file and saves it into playbook execution stats similar to M(ansible.builtin.set_stats) module. The module also performs base64-decoding of a terraform plan file from a variable defined into ansible facts and writes them into a file specified by the user.
